institution.name: St Cloud Technical and Community College

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at St Cloud Technical and Community College fell 25% between 2006 and 2009 (49.1% → 36.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at St Cloud Technical and Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (42.2% vs 48.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St Cloud Technical and Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).
